title: Unable to see and edit workflows due to NPM plugin
symptom: Users are unable to view or edit workflows, and attempts to zoom or fullscreen do not resolve the issue.
not_this_if: Workflows are visible in other environments
root_cause: Certain NPM plugins can interfere with the WeWeb interface, causing elements like workflows to not render properly. This can lead to a complete inability to interact with the workflow editor.
fix_steps: Identify the NPM plugins currently installed
Check if workflows are now visible and editable
agent_instruction: Remove the NPM plugin that is causing the conflict and refresh the interface.
